name: Easy Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the sweetened condensed milk, peanut butter, egg, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Add the biscuit mix and sugar; mix well.
4. Chill for at least 1 hour.
5. Shape into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll in sugar.
7. Place 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Flatten with a fork.
9. Bake for 6 to 8 minutes, or until lightly browned (do not over bake).
10. Cool and store tightly covered at room temperature.
Makes about 5 dozen.
